zh.Valence, Drôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Fr: 法國奧維-o-阿爾培斯德o姆瓦倫斯
zh.Montélimar, Drôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes,: 法國奧維-o-阿爾培斯德o姆蒙艾利馬
zh.Villefranche-de-Panat, Aveyron, Occitani: 法國奧其坦尼艾維倫維爾福朗-德-帕納特
zh.lifeSummary: 當Lambert Ier Adhémar de Monteil於1167年出生在法國奧維-o-阿爾培斯德o姆蒙艾利馬時，他的父親Géraud Ier Adhémar de Monteil38歲，母親Ermenssinde de Poitiers-Valentinois30歲。他於大約1183年與Thiburge IV des Baux-d'Orange在法國奧其坦尼艾維倫維爾福朗-德-帕納特結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1230年2月19日在他的家鄉享年63歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lambert Ier Adhémar de Monteil于1167年出生在法国奧維-o-阿爾培斯德o姆蒙艾利馬时，他的父亲Géraud Ier Adhémar de Monteil38岁，母亲Ermenssinde de Poitiers-Valentinois30岁。他于大约1183年与Thiburge IV des Baux-d'Orange在法国奧其坦尼艾維倫維爾福朗-德-帕納特结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1230年2月19日在他的家乡享年63岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Monteil
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized form of German or French   Montel  .

Swedish: ornamental name, probably from Latin mons, genitive montis ‘mountain, hill’ as a translation of the Swedish word or placename element berg (see Berg ) + the suffix -ell, a derivative of the Latin adjectival ending -elius.

variants.name: Montel
meanings: German: from a short form of an ancient Germanic personal name formed with munt ‘protection, guardianship’.
French: topographic name from Occitan montel ‘little mountain’, or a habitational name from Le Montel, the name of several places in Auvergne and Forez.

nameMeanings.name: Lambert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Transferred use of the surname, which is from an Old French given name of Germanic origin, from land ‘land, territory’ + beorht ‘famous’. This was introduced to Britain by the Normans, but its frequency in Britain in later centuries owed something to immigrants from the Low Countries, and it continued in occasional use into the 18th century at least. St Lambert of Maastricht was a 7th-century saint who aided St Willibrord in his evangelical work.

variants.name: Lammert
meanings: Transferred use of the surname, which is from an Old French given name of Germanic origin, from land ‘land, territory’ + beorht ‘famous’. This was introduced to Britain by the Normans, but its frequency in Britain in later centuries owed something to immigrants from the Low Countries, and it continued in occasional use into the 18th century at least. St Lambert of Maastricht was a 7th-century saint who aided St Willibrord in his evangelical work.

variants.name: Lamprecht
meanings: Transferred use of the surname, which is from an Old French given name of Germanic origin, from land ‘land, territory’ + beorht ‘famous’. This was introduced to Britain by the Normans, but its frequency in Britain in later centuries owed something to immigrants from the Low Countries, and it continued in occasional use into the 18th century at least. St Lambert of Maastricht was a 7th-century saint who aided St Willibrord in his evangelical work.

nameMeanings.name: Ier
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: and Norwegian vernacular form of   Peter .

variants.name: Peter
meanings: form of the name of the best-known of all Christ's apostles, traditionally regarded as the founder of the Christian Church. The name derives, via Latin, from Greek petros ‘stone, rock’. This is used as a translation of the Aramaic byname Cephas, given to the apostle Simon son of Jona, to distinguish him from another of the same name ( Simon Zelotes ). ‘When Jesus beheld him, he said, Thou art Simon the son of Jona: thou shalt be called Cephas, which is by interpretation, A stone’ (John 1:42). According to Matthew 16:17–18, Christ says more explicitly, ‘Blessed art thou, Simon Bar-jona … thou art Peter, and upon this rock I will build my church’. The name has been in continuous use since the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: When Lambert Ier Adhémar de Monteil was born in 1167, in Montélimar, Drôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France, his father, Géraud Ier Adhémar de Monteil, was 38 and his mother, Ermenssinde de Poitiers-Valentinois, was 30. He married Thiburge IV des Baux-d'Orange about 1183, in Villefranche-de-Panat, Aveyron, Occitanie, France. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 5 daughters. He died on 19 February 1230, in his hometown, at the age of 63.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lambert Ier Adhémar de Monteil est né en 1167, à Montélimar, Drôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France, son père, Géraud Ier Adhémar de Monteil, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Ermenssinde de Poitiers-Valentinois, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Thiburge IV des Baux-d'Orange environ 1183, à Villefranche-de-Panat, Aveyron, Occitanie, France. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé le 19 février 1230, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 63 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lambert Ier Adhémar de Monteil 1167 in Montélimar, Drôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Géraud Ier Adhémar de Monteil 38 und seine Mutter Ermenssinde de Poitiers-Valentinois 30. Er hat um 1183 in Villefranche-de-Panat, Aveyron, Occitanie, Frankreich Thiburge IV des Baux-d'Orange geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb am 19. Februar 1230 im Alter von 63 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lambert Ier Adhémar de Monteil è nato il nel 1167 nel Montélimar, Drôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia, il suo padre, Géraud Ier Adhémar de Monteil, aveva 38 anni e il suo madre, Ermenssinde de Poitiers-Valentinois, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Thiburge IV des Baux-d'Orange circa 1183, nel Villefranche-de-Panat, Aveyron, Occitanie, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 19 febbraio 1230, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 63 anni.

ja.Villefranche-de-Panat, Aveyron, Occitani: フランスオクシタニーエイビーロンヴィレフランチェ-デ-プアナト
ja.lifeSummary: Lambert Ier Adhémar de Monteilが1167年にフランスアウバーグネ-ルhoネ-アルペスドルoメモントeリマーで生まれた時，父Géraud Ier Adhémar de Monteilは38歳，母Ermenssinde de Poitiers-Valentinoisは30歳であった。約1183年にフランスオクシタニーエイビーロンヴィレフランチェ-デ-プアナトでThiburge IV des Baux-d'Orangeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1230年2月19日に故郷で63歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lambert Ier Adhémar de Monteil(이)가 1167년 프랑스 오버그니-ho니-알프스 드o 몽e리마에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Géraud Ier Adhémar de Monteil(은)는 38세였고, 그의 어머니 Ermenssinde de Poitiers-Valentinois(은)는 30세였다. 그는 대략 1183년 프랑스 옥시탠이 에비런 비레프랭체-데-파냇에서 Thiburge IV des Baux-d'Orange(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1230년 2월 19일 그의 고향에서 63세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lambert Ier Adhémar de Monteil nasceu em 1167, em Montélimar, Drôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, França, seu pai, Géraud Ier Adhémar de Monteil, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Ermenssinde de Poitiers-Valentinois, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Thiburge IV des Baux-d'Orange aproximadamente 1183, em Villefranche-de-Panat, Aveyron, Occitanie, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 19 de fevereiro de 1230, em sua cidade natal, com 63 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lambert Ier Adhémar de Monteil родился в 1167 г. в местности монтeлимар, дрoм, аувиргне-рoне-алпесь, Франция, его отцу по имени Géraud Ier Adhémar de Monteil было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Ermenssinde de Poitiers-Valentinois, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Thiburge IV des Baux-d'Orange около 1183 г. в местности виллефрэнче-де-панат, авирон, окситани, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 5 дочерей. Он умер 19 февраля 1230 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 63 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lambert Ier Adhémar de Monteil nació en 1167, en Montélimar, Drôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia, su papá, Géraud Ier Adhémar de Monteil, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Ermenssinde de Poitiers-Valentinois, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Thiburge IV des Baux-d'Orange aproximadamente 1183, en Villefranche-de-Panat, Aveyron, Occitanie, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 19 de febrero de 1230, en su pueblo, a la edad de 63 años.
